title: HAUTMEC Mini Hacksaw with Mitre Box Set, 150mm (6") Compact Hack Saw with Adjustable Cutting Angles & 6 Pcs Bi-Metal Blade, Precision Hand Saw for Wood, Metal, Plastic & DIY – HT0262
features: 【All-in-One Cutting Kit】Includes a 150mm (6"") junior hacksaw with tension adjustment, a lightweight aluminium mitre box, and 6 bi-metal fine-tooth blades for versatile cutting
【Accurate Angle Cutting】The sturdy mitre box enables precise 45° and 90° cuts, ideal for trimming mouldings, picture frames, plastic pipes, and craft projects
【High-Performance Blade】Supplied with 6pcs 24 TPI bi-metal blade featuring HSS wavy teeth for smooth, efficient cutting through wood, plastic, PVC, rubber, and light metal
【Adjustable & Ergonomic Design】Saw frame allows multiple blade angle settings with a quick tension adjustment knob. Fitted with a comfortable non-slip ABS grip to reduce fatigue
【Compact & Portable】Mitre box size: 13.5 x 3.2 x 4.8cm. Crafted from durable alloy yet lightweight enough for easy storage and transport. Perfect for small jobs, home repairs, crafts, and DIY use
description: Product Description HAUTMEC 6" Junior Hacksaw & Mitre Block Set Professional Bi-Metal Blades Aluminum Alloy Miter Box Aluminum Alloy Frame & ABS grip Multi-Angle Cutting Heavy Duty Bi-Metal Blade 24 TPI HSS Blade Wear resistance and safety Suitable for cutting Metal, Aluminum, Copper, PVC and Wood 90 Degree Angle Extended lip and side with 90 degree angle design make it stable to position on your workbench Easy Cutting Cutting in Accurate 45°, 90° and 135°angle ABS Grip Ergonomic and reduces pressure on hands when using Multi-Angle Cutting Hacksaw with tension adjustment knob, blades can be installed 6 angles Usage and Precautions The saw box should be fixed on the wooden table or board with about 4mm self-tapping screws to avoid the box sliding back and forth when sawing, which affects the accuracy. Sawing process due to hand shaking will inevitably hurt the saw groove on both sides of the wall, the depth direction will be sawing the bottom of the saw box, please be careful to use slow sawing action to extend the life of the saw box, do not be brutally hard and urgent, otherwise the workpiece and the saw box will be damaged. The sawing angle is not as accurate as the angle of milling machine or engraving process, because the angle of the saw cabinet slot clearance and manual back and forth pulling the saw, will cause the corresponding error, the angle of the strict requirements, please use other tools.
